title: Full MAP renewal assessment and cleanup cycle
description: Operator-requested full assessment of MAP system folders, structure, wording, processes, Emergence/Insights, LangGraph use, HPOM, and stale-old-vs-new alignment. Make a whole MAP backup before edits, run current validators and targeted research where needed, produce a renewal assessment, and implement bounded safe improvements or create follow-up tasks for larger changes.
acceptance_criteria: A whole MAP_System backup exists before any renewal edits and its path is recorded in the assessment.
Assessment covers folder structure, stale wording/path drift, process gates, Emergence/Insights, Research use, LangGraph/graph use, HPOM, and open improvement backlog.
Safe high-confidence wording/process cleanups are implemented under declared output paths; larger or risky changes become explicit follow-up tasks instead of silent broad edits.
Relevant validators and tests are run, including task mirrors, task graph, shared state, decisions, events, emergence, and the full MAP test suite when feasible.
